prompt:
Read PAYLOAD-CMS-BRIEF.md in the project root for full context.

Current state: branch `feature/payload-cms-content`, Payload v3 already installed with SQLite adapter.

Tasks to complete (in order):
1. Fix any broken/deleted files (database.db deleted, payload-full.config.ts deleted — restore or fix)
2. Ensure `payload.config.ts` is correct and working
3. Write/fix seed script `scripts/seed-payload.ts` to seed all data from `src/data/portfolio.json`
4. Update pages to read from Payload local API (page.tsx, cases/page.tsx, projects/[slug]/page.tsx)
5. Ensure admin works at /admin
6. Run `npm run build` to verify no TypeScript errors
7. Stage and commit all changes

Output <promise>COMPLETE</promise> when:
- npm run build succeeds
- All pages still work (no broken imports)
- seed script exists and runs without errors
- All changes committed
